mapper.sql: id, monograph_id, author_id, author_name, editor_type, ranking, identity, dept_id, dept_name, unit_id, in_out, division_code, author_code, author_type, sex, work_ratio, words_num, note, edu_degree, edu_level, title, is_first, is_hosp_member
mapper.select: SELECT smonauthor.id RowId,author_id authorrowid ,author_name authorname, editor_type isthehosrowid,seditortype.name isthehos,ranking rangerowid,sauthororder.name rangename, smonauthor.identity, dept_id, dept_name, unit_id, in_out, division_code, author_code, author_type typerowid,susertype.name typename, smonauthor.sex, case when smonauthor.sex=0 then '女' when smonauthor.sex=1 then '男' else '' END as sexName, work_ratio as workRatio, words_num as wordsNum, smonauthor.note as note, smonauthor.edu_degree, smonauthor.edu_level, smonauthor.title, smonauthor.is_first, smonauthor.is_hosp_member FROM srm_monograph_info_author smonauthor left join ct_srm_user suser on suser.id=smonauthor.author_id left join ct_srm_person_type susertype on susertype.code=smonauthor.author_type left join ct_srm_paper_author_order sauthororder on sauthororder.code=smonauthor.ranking left join ct_srm_editor_type seditortype on seditortype.code=smonauthor.editor_type where monograph_id=#{monographId}
select id from srm_monograph_info_author mon where monograph_id=#{parref}
